title: orguia #3712
definition:
1) fathom, the distance across the breast from the tip of one middle
    finger to the tip of the other when the arms are outstretched,
    5 to 6 feet (2 m)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) fathom, the distance across the breast from the tip of one middle
    finger to the tip of the other when the arms are outstretched,
